Bash(git -C /Users/a1226603/Dropbox/Website/pourmousavi.github.io commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add global link styles with animated underline effect

Style all links with theme colors and animated underline that grows on hover.
Visited links show in muted grey-blue to indicate already visited.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/a1226603/Dropbox/Website/pourmousavi.github.io commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix global link styles to only apply to inline text links

Use a:not\([class]\) selector so animated underline only affects plain
links without CSS classes. Styled components like buttons and resource
links retain their original appearance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
